Journal Of Ibn Haldun Studies Has Been Published

28.03.2023

Volume 8, Issue 1 (2023) of the Journal of Ibn Haldun Studies has been published.

The new issue can be accessed via:

https://journal.ihu.edu.tr

The new issue includes the following articles:

Spiritual Care in Campus: The Case of Britain and Implications for Turkey / Üzeyir Ok, Ayşe Burcu Gören

Pressure Groups Influential in School Administration / Şafi Önk, Mehmet Ekinci, Mehmet Diyadin Ekinci, Zikri Demir

An Evaluation of Canvas LMS through Universal Design for Learning Principles and IMS Standards / Mehmet Akın Bulut

Pandemic Process and Helping Behavior: A Qualitative Study (Example of Aksaray City Police Officers) / Elif Kara

Book Review / Kitap Tanıtımı: Islamic Commercial Law - Contemporariness, Normativeness, and Competence / Jibril Swalleh Mawejje
